reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I had booked wrong date and paid , no stay there how can rate ? No one at hotel call me for ask whats happen or how . So i didnot rate this hotel

reviews.title: The receptionist is terrible.
reviews.text: The experience was terrible, I booked a room on the app, but when I arrived at the hotel, they didn't accept it, even though it was nearly 11 PM. They wouldn't let me check in; the staff on duty didn't know how to check the room code. After a lengthy argument and waiting for over 30 minutes, the staff compelled me to pay an extra 650,000 VND for a deposit to access the room and promised to resolve the issue in the morning. When the staff member came in the morning, they didn't admit their mistake, argued with the customer, and said they had received no information even though I booked it at 5 PM. The attitude was very rude. In a service profession, I think the hotel should fire this staff member to avoid causing discomfort to customers. The handling was extremely poor. The way they spoke was disrespectful. I've never encountered a hotel with such terrible staff.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Tới bắt đổi phòng, giá mắc hơn, nói chung tệ

reviews.title: Fire customer peach
reviews.text: After booking a standard room on the app and arriving at the hotel, I was given a room that was worse than a motel. When I asked for a resolution, the hotel blamed the app and did not provide a reasonable solution. They told me that if I wanted a standard room as booked on the app, I would have to cancel the booking on the app and pay extra to get a room like the one on the app. They kept insisting it was the app's fault, but actually booking through the app meant I was supported with fees. I wasted an hour without finding a place to stay, and I truly can't believe the poor way of working and the blame-shifting mentality.

reviews.title: The hotel needs a lot of improvement.
reviews.text: Although there is convenient parking, the overall experience was not as expected. The bathroom was not clean, and the dresser still had used condoms…

reviews.title: Not a Peaceful Stay
reviews.text: This was a very unusual and unsettling experience. Around midnight, a group of police officers came and knocked on every room door for an administrative check, asking all guests to present their identification documents. It was confusing and quite concerning. I'm now questioning whether the hotel is truly safe and if it has ever been involved in any legal issues before, even though this wasn't mentioned in any previous reviews

reviews.title: Inconvenient
reviews.text: There is no hair dryer and electric kettle.

reviews.title: Not worth the money.
reviews.text: Nice but small room, no windows.

reviews.title: If you need a few hours to stay.... it is suitable
reviews.text: This is a great hotel for an airport layover or to get a few hours of rest.  The rooms are small and simple.  The bathroom is a simple design which anyone in the bedroom can see through.  Generally speaking, this hotel is used by locals or for local couples having fun for a few hours.  For a single foreigner traveling alone, it probably would be suitable for all that single traveler's needs, but just FYI, it is very basic; however, the staff tries their best to be helpful.

reviews.text: 入住必须14点，早来你得等着，不像别的酒店，可以让你提前进去。
